Ilaaj AI

Pakistan's first AI-powered health platform. Chat about your symptoms in any language, get AI triage, and receive doctor-verified prescriptions — affordable and accessible, 24/7.

© 2026 Ilaaj AI. All rights reserved.

Ilaaj AI is for general health consultations and non-emergency medical guidance. For emergencies, call 1122 (Rescue) or visit the nearest hospital.
